text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, June 10. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: I checked the recent logs for that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! That's wonderful. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sleep quality is so important. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Planning for future education costs. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 4th grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
